description.unified: Attacks an enemy 3 times, dealing ??? P.DMG and increasing ??? P.DMG the target takes by [30%->25%] for [4 sec->10 sec]. Afterward, each hit inflicts 1 stack of [Mortal Wound] that deals ??? P.DMG over 16 sec. [Mortal Wound] can be stacked up to max 5 times.

Increases all allies' ATK and P.Dodge by [300->250] for [7 sec->10 sec]. Afterward, Roi grants [Specter's Breath] upon self for 10 sec. For the duration of [Specter's Breath], increases own ATK Spd by [30%->250], DMG dealt to enemies by [25%->20%], and evades all P.DMG attacks

Moves behind an enemy and deals ??? P.DMG. Consumes stacks of [Mortal Wound] from the target adding ??? P.DMG for every 1 stack. Upon a Crit Hit recovers [(added) 2 orbs of Mana] and resets Cooldown of [Hack].
Increases Crit Chance by 300. If normal attack is landed as a Crit Hit attacks the target 6 times, dealing additional ??? P.DMG and inflicting a stack of [Mortal Wound] with a 50% chance.

light.unified: Mana cost is reduced by 1 [(removed) The target is changed to the enemy with the highest ATK].

dark.unified: Auto attack DMG is boosted by [115%->100%] for the duration.

light.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, DMG dealt is increased by 100%.
Each attack recovers 300 mana [(removed) The chance for [Rend] to apply [Fatal Wound] stacks is changed to 100%].

description.unified: [No Mercy] Dispels all negative effects from self, and recovers Mana by {0} upon Critial hit.
[Curtain of Darkness] For the duration of Skill, recovers own Mana by [(added) 150 every sec] and increases own DMG dealt against Bosses by {0}%.
[Hack] Increases DMG by 50%. Upon a Critical Hit, increases own ATK Spd by {0} for 5 sec.

dark.unified: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by [300%->300] and Crit DMG is increased by 60% for 5 sec. Does not activate again during activation.

description.unified: Each auto attack has a {0}% chance of inflicting 1 stack of [Mortal Wound]. Each stack of [Mortal Wound] deals additional DMG equal to {1}% of ATK.
